creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #54)

Hi! That's me again. Currently running nyxt with Webkit version 2.46.5. Everything is working fine.

Regarding ProcessLauncherGlib, try this patch:
https://github.com/shamazmazum/freebsd-ports/blob/master/www/webkit2-gtk3/files/patch-Source_WebKit_UIProcess_Launcher_glib_ProcessLauncherGLib.cpp

All other patches I had to apply is here:
https://github.com/shamazmazum/freebsd-ports/tree/master/www/webkit2-gtk3/files
